message:
test(engine): enrichment tests for shadow ablation, security E2E, version matrix, and test logging

shadow_ablation_engine.rs (+221 lines):
  Tests for deterministic shadow ablation engine for PLAS capability tightening.
  Validates subtraction experiments from static upper-bound capability set,
  minimal set discovery preserving correctness/policy invariants/risk budgets.

security_e2e.rs (+166 lines):
  End-to-end security test framework simulating 8 attack categories: capability
  escalation, resource exhaustion, quarantine cascade, safe-mode fallback,
  Bayesian posterior convergence, fork detection, epoch regression, and evidence
  integrity. Validates containment and recovery across failure scenarios.

version_matrix_lane.rs (+178 lines):
  Tests for pinned version combination management across local/remote repos with
  boundary surface specifications. Validates version compatibility matrix testing
  and regression masking prevention across version boundaries.

test_logging_schema.rs (+139 lines, FRX-20.4):
  Tests for deterministic test logging schema with correlation policy. Validates
  required correlation fields (scenario_id, trace_id, decision_id, policy_id,
  seed), schema version enforcement, and structured logging contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
